Performance data, AHRI ratings and wiring diagram section.

lookup_rules.caution: Applies broadly to split AC/heat pump model numbers, but always verify.

lookup_rules.rule: GSZ14 is Goodman 14 SEER-class split heat pump family using R-410A; GSZ140301 is 30,000 BTU / 2.5 ton single-phase pattern.
lookup_rules.caution: Exact suffix/revision matters for parts and wiring.

lookup_rules.rule: Service manuals are generally for trained HVAC technicians only; homeowners should use owner manuals and call a licensed pro for electrical, refrigerant, gas, or combustion work.
lookup_rules.caution: Use safety note in RoofingHut answers.

lookup_rules.rule: Most water heater brands encode manufacture date in serial number, but each brand differs.
lookup_rules.caution: Use brand-specific age lookup before advising replacement age.

lookup_rules.rule: Common terminals: R/Rc/Rh 24V, C common, Y compressor, G fan, W/Aux heat, O/B reversing valve.
lookup_rules.caution: Heat pumps require careful O/B and aux heat setup.

lookup_rules.rule: Panel, breaker, transfer switch, surge protector, EV charger and generator wiring should be handled by qualified/licensed electricians.
lookup_rules.caution: Never present dangerous electrical work as DIY.

troubleshooting_topics.first_checks: Check thermostat mode/settings, breaker/disconnect, outdoor unit running, ice buildup, air filter, error codes. Escalate refrigerant/electrical issues to pro.
troubleshooting_topics.needed_documents: GSZ14 docs, brand manual, thermostat manual

troubleshooting_topics.first_checks: Some frost is normal; heavy ice may mean defrost issue, airflow restriction, low refrigerant, sensor/board issue.
troubleshooting_topics.needed_documents: Service manual, wiring diagram, defrost board docs

troubleshooting_topics.first_checks: Check batteries if applicable, furnace/air-handler power, float switch, breaker, low-voltage fuse.
troubleshooting_topics.needed_documents: Thermostat manual, air handler wiring diagram

troubleshooting_topics.first_checks: Check breaker, reset, thermostat, elements; electrical testing is pro-level.
Use exact brand/model error table; check venting, gas supply, water flow, ignition, condensate.
Track entry vs visible stain; inspect flashing, pipe boots, valleys, skylights, vents, nail pops.
Do not keep resetting; possible overload, short, ground fault, failed appliance or breaker.
Check monitoring app, inverter status, shading, dirty panels, breaker/disconnect, grid outage.
Identify brand/model, cartridge/stem, shutoff, exact parts diagram.
Check filter, drain hose high loop/air gap, garbage disposal knockout, pump obstruction. Use exact model manual before disassembly.
Check load balance, lid/door lock, drain issue, error code, belt/direct drive notes by model.
troubleshooting_topics.needed_documents: Washer manual and error code chart

troubleshooting_topics.first_checks: Check lint restriction, breaker/gas supply, vent blockage; electrical/gas testing is pro-level.
Check condenser coils, door seal, evaporator fan, condenser fan, start relay, error codes.
Check photo eyes/safety sensors, door balance, travel limits, force settings, obstruction.
Check battery, fuel supply, exercise schedule, error code, oil level, transfer switch status.
Check power/GFCI, float switch, pit debris, check valve, discharge freezing/clogging.
